title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
